0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata and hybrid retrieval."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Dual-Key Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory uses a dual-key design for flexible access patterns:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," | TEXT | Full experience record |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"embedding"}]," | BLOB | Vector embedding |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary"}]," | TEXT | AAAK-compressed summary |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags"}]," | TEXT | JSON array |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," | TEXT | Origin |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," | TEXT | Grouping key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | INTEGER | Unix timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidated_at"}]," | INTEGER | When promoted from Working |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Hybrid Scoring"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieval combines three signals:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"score = (vector_similarity * 0.5) + \n      (fts_rank * 0.3) + \n      (temporal_proximity * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Signal | Weight | Description |\n|--------|--------|-------------|\n| Vector similarity | 0.5 | Semantic closeness to query |\n| FTS5 rank | 0.3 | Full-text match quality |\n| Temporal proximity | 0.2 | Recency of the memory |"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Weights are configurable per-query:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"results = mem.recall(\n  \"project deadline\",\n  vector_weight=0.7,\n  text_weight=0.2,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n)","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Missing diagram content"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session Grouping"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic entries can be grouped by session for chronological recall:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Store with session\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"User approved the design mockup.\",\n  session_id=\"design-review-2026-04-25\",\n  tags=[\"design\", \"approval\"],\n)\n\n# Recall entire session\nsession = mem.recall_session(\"design-review-2026-04-25\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Metric | Value |\n|--------|-------|\n| Median retrieval | 85ms |\n| Storage per entry | ~2KB (compressed) |\n| Queryable fields | content, tags, source, session_id, date range |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout Tags are indexed via FTS5 and heavily weighted in retrieval scoring. Good tags: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[\"api-design\", \"decision\", \"user-feedback\"]"}],".
